creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text:
google-cloud-sdk version 426.0.0 added this line, which immediately crashes when running almost any command, because platforms.py doesn't have any definition for FreeBSD.

https://github.com/twistedpair/google-cloud-sdk/commit/59a95bafaddd85614f04e890f437451ee1b946be#diff-c9fdd196a4a0d3f74b672072e0044bac24c27969a54af489581645d0dbd5104cR628

The crash looks like this:

ERROR: gcloud crashed (AttributeError): 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'clean_version'

The attached patch fixes the problem.  I can't figure out any way to report this bug upstream.  Perhaps you can?
